race.description: Colt Prosser Racing Country Boosted Showcase Mdn Plate
race.comment: LITTLE MISS SASS (5) handy debut from the wide gate with a fighting fourth over 900m at Scone in the heavy conditions. Finds a weaker race and open to further improvement. MARKWELL TOPSORT (3) finished runner-up at all three starts and can put these away on the quick back-up. Sat on the speed for a game nose second over 1000m at Taree. Winkers go on and expected to go close. LYKOS (6) twelve-start Maiden who comes back in trip. Mixing her form and deserves another chance from the inside gate. Keep safe in a suitable contest. AUGUST RUSH (1) returns after five months in the paddock. Showed enough in his first campaign and looked sharp with a recent trial win over 805m at Coffs Harbour. Can stalk the speed and prove hard to hold out. NEW BEGINNINGS (7) never handled the heavy(10) conditions at her second career start and stays in the mix.
